title: Royal air cruiser
content: {{Top|leg}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:NabooStarFighter.jpg]] |name=Royal air cruiser |designer= |manufacturer=[[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]] |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] (1) |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (2) |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=[[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] }} The [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] '''royal air cruiser''' was a model of [[air cruiser]] employed by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. ==Characteristics== The airspeeder frame was devoted to propulsion, while the power supply for the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannon was installed just above the cannon itself. Royal air cruisers provided firepower that could level enemy ground installations or take out slow-moving artillery, but were not well suited to defending against ground troops, airspeeders, or ground speeders. ==History== [[File:RoyalAirCruiser.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Multiple views of air cruiser.]] The design presented an engineering challenge to the [[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]] because the goal was to mount a turbolaser cannon with firepower typical for a capital starship onto a mid-sized tactical airspeeder. They compromised by essentially hanging the cannon below a [[Cloud car/Legends|cloud car]]-like vessel shaped like a flying wing. ==Behind the scenes== The Royal air cruiser pilot was voiced by [[Paula Killen]] in the game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' credits screen, Game\Data\LIST_x1.CRX ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Naboo vehicle classes]] [[Category:Repulsorcraft models]] [[Category:Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps products]]
